name: Perfect Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 Golden Delicious apples, peeled, cored, and sliced (up to 6)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the sliced apples with sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and flour until combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a pie pan lined with a pre-baked pie crust.
3. Dot the top of the filling with small pieces of butter or margarine.
4. Cover with the top crust and seal the edges. Make sure to cut designs or slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 50 minutes, or until the apples are tender and the crust is golden brown. Watch carefully during the last 15 minutes to ensure the edges do not burn.
